## 📋 PR 类型 / PR Type

<!-- 请选择本次 PR 的类型 / Please select the type of this PR -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug 修复 / Bug Fix
- [ ] ✨ 新功能 / New Feature
- [ ] 📝 文档更新 / Documentation Update
- [ ] 🎨 代码优化/重构 / Code Refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ 性能优化 / Performance Improvement
- [ ] 🔧 配置/构建相关 / Build/Config Changes
- [ ] 🧪 测试相关 / Test Changes
- [ ] 🌐 国际化/本地化 / i18n/l10n
- [ ] 🔒 安全修复 / Security Fix
- [ ] ♿ 可访问性改进 / Accessibility Improvement

## 🔗 关联 Issue / Related Issue

<!-- 请填写相关的 Issue 编号，如果没有请说明原因 -->
<!-- Please provide related issue number, or explain why there isn't one -->

Closes #
Related to #

## 📝 变更说明 / Change Description

### 变更内容 / What Changed

<!-- 详细描述本次 PR 做了什么改动 -->
<!-- Describe in detail what changes were made in this PR -->


### 变更原因 / Why This Change

<!-- 为什么需要这个改动？解决了什么问题？ -->
<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->


### 实现方案 / How It Works

<!-- 简要说明实现思路和关键技术点 -->
<!-- Briefly explain the implementation approach and key technical points -->


## 💥 破坏性变更 / Breaking Changes

- [ ] ✅ 无破坏性变更 / No breaking changes
- [ ] ⚠️ 包含破坏性变更（请在下方详细说明）/ Contains breaking changes (please explain below)

<!-- 如果有破坏性变更，请详细说明影响范围和迁移方案 -->
<!-- If there are breaking changes, please explain the impact and migration plan -->

- [ ] 回归测试通过 / Regression tests passed
- [ ] 边界情况测试 / Edge cases tested
- [ ] 不同浏览器测试 / Cross-browser testing (if applicable)

<!-- Please provide detailed test steps for reviewers to verify -->

## 📸 截图/录屏 / Screenshots/Recording

<!-- 如果是 UI 相关改动，请提供前后对比截图或录屏 -->
<!-- For UI changes, please provide before/after screenshots or screen recording -->

### Before
<!-- 改动前 -->

### After
<!-- 改动后 -->

## ✅ 代码质量检查 / Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] 代码符合项目编码规范 / Code follows project coding standards
- [ ] 已添加必要的注释 / Added necessary comments
- [ ] 已更新相关文档 / Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] 没有遗留的 console.log / debug 代码 / No leftover console.log/debug code
- [ ] 没有遗留的 TODO/FIXME 注释 / No leftover TODO/FIXME comments (or documented)
- [ ] 代码已经过自我 review / Self-reviewed the code
- [ ] 考虑了性能影响 / Considered performance impact
- [ ] 考虑了安全性 / Considered security implications
- [ ] 处理了错误情况 / Error cases handled properly

## 📦 依赖变更 / Dependency Changes

- [ ] 无依赖变更 / No dependency changes
- [ ] 添加了新依赖 / Added new dependencies
- [ ] 更新了现有依赖 / Updated existing dependencies
- [ ] 移除了依赖 / Removed dependencies

<!-- 如果有依赖变更，请说明原因和影响 -->
<!-- If there are dependency changes, please explain the reason and impact -->


## 🔄 数据库/配置变更 / Database/Config Changes

- [ ] 无数据库或配置变更 / No database or config changes
- [ ] 需要数据库迁移 / Requires database migration
- [ ] 需要配置文件更新 / Requires config file updates

<!-- 如果有变更，请提供迁移脚本或说明 -->
<!-- If there are changes, please provide migration scripts or instructions -->


## 📚 文档更新 / Documentation Updates

- [ ] README 已更新 / README updated
- [ ] API 文档已更新 / API documentation updated
- [ ] 变更日志已更新 / Changelog updated
- [ ] 不需要文档更新 / No documentation needed

## 🤔 需要特别关注的地方 / Areas Needing Special Attention

<!-- 有哪些地方需要 reviewer 特别注意？有什么不确定的地方？ -->
<!-- What areas need special attention from reviewers? Any uncertainties? -->

<!-- 其他需要说明的内容 -->
<!-- Any other information that would be helpful -->


---

## ⚠️ 提交前最终检查 / Final Checklist Before Submitting

- [ ] 我已经阅读并理解了项目的贡献指南 / I have read and understood the contribution guidelines
- [ ] 我的代码遵循了项目的代码规范 / My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] 我已经进行了充分的测试 / I have performed adequate testing
- [ ] 我已经更新了相关文档 / I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] 我的提交信息清晰明确 / My commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] 我已经解决了所有的 merge conflicts / I have resolved all merge conflicts
- [ ] 我确认这个 PR 可以被合并 / I confirm this PR is ready to be merged
